title: Mass marketing and niche marketing
summary: 9609 AS — undifferentiated vs targeted marketing strategies.
learningObjectives: Compare advantages and disadvantages of each.
Select appropriate strategy for given firms.
Link to product life cycle and resources.

simpleExplanation.title: Everyone vs a specific few
simpleExplanation.summary: Mass marketing sells one offer to the whole market. Niche marketing focuses on a small segment with tailored products.
steps: Mass: economies of scale, TV advertising.
Niche suits small firms and specialists.

sections.content: **Mass vs niche** (3.1.5) follows **3.1.4 B2C/B2B**. Judge **fit** using firm size and product type.
